basic_details.job_title: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank (TMB) Agricultural Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out for Assistant Manager Posts
basic_details.total_vacancies: Not Specified (Multiple posts as per requirement)
basic_details.short_information: Tamilnad Mercantile Bank (TMB) is inviting applications from dynamic, result-oriented, and agriculture-domain professionals for engagement as Agricultural Officer on a regular basis. This is a specialist officer recruitment aimed at strengthening the bank's rural and agricultural lending portfolio across India.

application_fee.details: No application fee is required. The registration process is free of cost for all candidates.

qualification.details: Candidates must satisfy all the eligibility conditions as on the cut-off date 30.04.2026. Only Indian citizens are eligible to apply.
qualification.experience: Minimum 3 years of post-qualification relevant experience in agricultural lending / rural banking in Scheduled Commercial Banks, Regional Rural Banks (RRBs), NABARD, or any other financial institutions.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per IBA Scale for Scale-I Officer (Approx. ₹36,000 – ₹45,000 per month initially + allowances)

selection_process: The selection process for TMB Agricultural Officer consists of the following stages:
Stage 1: Shortlisting Applications will be scrutinized based on educational qualifications
and other eligibility parameters. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the next stage.

Stage 2: Personal Interview Shortlisted candidates will be called for a Personal Interview either in person (Direct) or through Video Conferencing. The interview will assess domain knowledge in agriculture
and overall suitability for the role. Candidates will be informed individually via email / post regarding the interview schedule.
Stage 3: Document Verification & Medical Examination Final selection is subject to verification of all original documents
and being declared medically fit as per the bank's standards.

Promoting modern agricultural practices and technologies among farmers by providing suitable financial products and incentives. Educating and guiding farmers regarding various central and state government subsidies
and support programs. Conducting detailed assessment and appraisal of agricultural loan proposals including crop loans
and agri-business ventures. Performing comprehensive risk evaluation of agricultural advances by analyzing crop patterns
and other relevant factors. Organizing regular awareness camps

and financial literacy programs in rural areas. Serving as the key liaison officer between the bank and the rural farming community to understand their evolving needs and expectations. Keeping abreast of latest NABARD guidelines

and other government schemes related to agriculture. Monitoring and follow-up of agricultural loan accounts to ensure timely repayment and reduce NPA levels. Any other duties and responsibilities assigned by the Bank from time to time.
how_to_apply: Visit the official career portal: www.ib.tmbonline.bank.in/tmb_careers/
Click on the link for “Recruitment Advertisement – Agricultural Officer” and download the detailed advertisement.
Ensure you meet all eligibility criteria before proceeding.
Click on “Apply Online” and register using a valid email ID and mobile number.
After registration, you will receive an activation link on email and credentials on mobile.
Login using the Registration Number / Username and Password.
Fill all personal, educational, and experience details carefully.
Upload scanned copies of required documents within the prescribed size limits.
Verify the preview of the application and submit.
Take a printout of the final submitted application for future reference.
Recent passport-size photograph (390×520 pixels, max 120 KB)
SSLC / Higher Secondary Mark Sheet for age proof
All Degree Certificates and Mark Sheets
important_instructions: This is regular employment with all benefits applicable to Scale-I Officers. Selected candidates are liable to be transferred anywhere in India. Canvassing in any form will result in immediate disqualification. The Bank reserves the right to reject any application at any stage without assigning reasons. All disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Tamil Nadu only.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply online for TMB Agricultural Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application form is 06 June 2026. It is highly recommended that candidates complete the entire process including document upload at least 2-3 days before the closing date. This helps avoid technical glitches, server overload, and gives time to correct any mistakes in the application. Late applications will not be accepted under any circumstances.

faq.question: Q2. What educational qualification is needed for the TMB Agricultural Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Bachelor’s Degree in Agriculture with at least 50% marks. Higher qualifications or specializations in allied fields like Horticulture, Veterinary Science, Dairy Technology, or Agricultural Engineering will be considered as added advantages during shortlisting and interview. The degree must be from a UGC-recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. Is prior work experience mandatory for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes. A minimum of 3 years relevant experience in banking or financial institutions focusing on agricultural lending is compulsory. Experience certificates and relieving letters must be uploaded. Freshers are not eligible to apply for this position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for TMB Agricultural Officer 2026?
faq.answer: The maximum age is 30 years as on 30 April 2026. Candidates belonging to reserved categories can claim age relaxation as per Government norms mentioned in the detailed advertisement.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee to be paid?
faq.answer: No. Tamilnad Mercantile Bank has kept the application fee as Nil for all categories. Candidates do not have to pay any amount while submitting the online form.

faq.question: Q6. How is the selection process conducted for Agricultural Officer in TMB?
faq.answer: The process involves shortlisting of applications followed by a Personal Interview (Direct or Video Conferencing). Final selection depends on interview performance, document verification, and medical fitness.

faq.question: Q7. What are the major roles of an Agricultural Officer in TMB?
faq.answer: The role involves extensive field work including loan origination, risk assessment, farmer education, scheme implementation, and portfolio monitoring. Officers act as subject matter experts in agriculture for their assigned branches and regions.

faq.question: Q8. Will selected candidates be posted only in Tamil Nadu?
faq.answer: No. Selected candidates can be posted anywhere in India as per the business needs of the bank. The job is fully transferable.

faq.question: Q9. How can I download the call letter for the interview?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates will be intimated individually through email and SMS. Interview call letters, if required, can be downloaded from the login portal using registration credentials.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job or contractual?
faq.answer: This is a regular and permanent recruitment in the Assistant Manager cadre. After successful completion of the probation period, candidates will enjoy all benefits applicable to permanent officers of the bank.
